prestazioni: Engine swap to a 4B11T (from the Lancer Ralliart/Evo X) with a forged internals build including Manley I-beam connecting rods, JE 8.5:1 compression pistons, and ACL Race Series bearings, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust by Tomei with a 50mm wastegate dump tube

Full bolt-on supporting mods for the 4B11T: HKS Hi-Power 80mm MAF, Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, AEM 3.5 BAR MAP sensor, and a custom ECU tune via Haltech Elite 2500 with flex-fuel capability and launch control mapped for 2-step anti-lag

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the RVR's 5x114.3 bolt pattern), SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and rear trailing arms), and a Cusco 2-point strut tower brace (front) paired with a rear upper strut brace by Ultra Racing
estetica: Rocket Bunny RVR-specific widebody kit (Pandem V2) with extended fenders, custom carbon fiber side skirts, and a duckbill rear spoiler, all finished in a matte vinyl wrap (3M 1080 Gloss Black) with red pinstriping

Custom front bumper lip by Varis Japan (RVR-specific design) with integrated LED fog lights and a carbon fiber splitter, paired with a custom rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon with dual 3.5-inch exhaust cutouts for the Tomei setup

Enkei PF07 wheels (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +38 rear) in Hyper Silver with Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear), wrapped in a custom red/white/black livery inspired by the Mitsubishi Works rally cars, with JDM-spec yellow turn signals and a custom LED taillight overlay by Diode Dynamics
